untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'complex pullback patterns' (pattern recognition with multi-touch reversal detection) and multi-timeframe analysis (shift to higher timeframe and comparative pattern complexity assessment). These require structural price action pattern detection and cross-timeframe correlation logic that cannot be expressed using only single-timeframe indicator comparisons and the allowed operators. The core logic—comparing pullback complexity across timeframes and trading only when higher timeframe shows simpler structure—requires custom pattern recognition functions not available in standard indicator vocabulary.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using trend strength (ADX) as proxy for TRENDING regime requirement. Entry uses pivot points as approximate reversal level. However, the essential multi-timeframe pullback complexity comparison logic is untranslatable without custom pattern detection algorithms.
